# Metaproductions
The core templates are in `wizzi-cli/.wizzi/metaprods/tfolder`. They are plain copied in the `t/cli` and `t/wz` folders of `wizzi-cli/dist`.
Metaproductions include core sources from `t/wz` and core context properties from `t/cli`.
Others folders in `wizzi-cli/.wizzi/metaprods/` are copied in the `wizzi-cli/dist/resources/create/contexts` and `wizzi-cli/dist/resources/create/templates` folder with the wizzi `folder-name` command of the Wizzi CLI.
These `wizzi-cli/dist/resources/create/contexts` and `wizzi-cli/dist/resources/create/templates` contains one folder for each Meta Production. The folder name is the name of the Meta Production.
ITTF Documents in `wizzi-cli/dist/resources/create/templates` include templates from the `wizzi-cli/dist/resource/create/t/wz` folder.
